title: psydrax kaessneri
intro: Psydrax kaessneri, also known as the African boxwood or kaessner's psydrax, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Psydrax kaessneri include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various infections, making it a valuable herb for natural remedies. In herbal preparations, the leaves and bark of the plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions for their medicinal properties.
